title: Change '确认' button text color to black

requirements.text: Change the text color of all '确认' (Confirm) buttons throughout the application to black (#000000 or text-black).

quotes: 把：确认 这个字改成黑色

acceptanceCriteria: All '确认' button labels render in black text across every modal and form in the application.
The change applies consistently in UploadPasscodeModal, DeletePasscodeModal, and any other component containing a '确认' button.
No other button styles or colors are affected.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
Only change the text color of '确认' labels; do not alter button background, border, or other styles.
nonGoals: Changing any other text or button colors beyond '确认'.
